Event: The Bastion Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 19/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR386
Royal Bastion Gear

When the armor's wearer gains a positive effect, their physical and magic armor, damage and physical armor piercing increase by 10% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 10 times. The ability triggers once per 0,5 sec.

Once in a while, the unit fires enhanced arrows at 3 random enemy units. When an arrow hits, it deals physical damage equal to 300% of the armor wearer's attack, and the wearer gains a shield equal to 50% of the damage dealt with the ability. The shield blocks damage of any type and exists up to 5 sec. The enemy units hit with these arrows are also entangled in a spiky vine. For 4 sec., they cannot move or use any abilities (except those granted by the equipped set). Every second during that time, exhaustion is applied to the entangled enemy units. They receive physical damage equal to 200% of the unit's attack every second. While the enemy units are exhausted, their damage and attack speed are reduced by 30%. The exhaustion lasts for 4 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
